creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
jgh         2012-02-04 00:56:53 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    ports-mgmt           Makefile 
  Added files:
    ports-mgmt/fbsdmon   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    ports-mgmt/fbsdmon/files 600.fbsdmon.in fbsdmon.in 
                             patch-src__io.c pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  Add new port: fbsdmon
  
  Submit system and ports statistics to fbsdmon.org.
  Statistics can be sent from command line, from rc script
  or from periodic script.
  
  WWW: http://fbsdmon.org/
  
  PR: ports/164608
  Submitted by: Grzegorz Blach <magik at roorback.net>
  Approved by:    rene (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
